name: context-pack
description: Repo-local context packs and handoff checkpoints for coding agents.

interface.shortDescription: Start agents from focused repo context.
interface.longDescription: Context Pack keeps a lightweight repo-local context library, provides one-command setup, repair, and start flows, installs shared repo rules for Codex, Claude, and Cursor, writes ignored local checkpoints by default, and generates task or review packs so coding agents can begin from relevant files, contracts, tests, and stale warnings instead of rereading the repository.
defaultPrompt: Set up Context Pack in this repo.
Build a review context pack for my changes.
Checkpoint this work for the next session.
